title: AI and the future of employment
explanation:
AI and the future of employment

Artificial intelligence is transforming workplaces faster than many governments expected. Routine administrative tasks, basic translation and some forms of data analysis can already be automated. However, experts argue that AI is more likely to change jobs than eliminate them entirely. Workers who combine technical skills with creativity, communication and ethical judgement may become more valuable. The real challenge, therefore, is not only technological development but also education systems that help people adapt throughout their careers.

questions.text: AI can already automate some [*administrative tasks|sports events|weather patterns only].
Experts think AI will probably [*change jobs rather than remove all of them|end all employment immediately|have no effect].
questions.feedback: Change jobs rather than eliminate entirely.

questions.text: Valuable workers may combine technical skills with creativity and [*ethical judgement|physical strength only|holiday planning].
The main challenge includes helping people adapt through [*education|tourism|fashion].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Governments did not always expect such rapid ____.  | *transformation | vacation | recipe
Basic translation is one task that can be ____.  | *automated | painted | cooked
Communication is one skill that may become more ____.  | *valuable | illegal | distant
People may need to adapt throughout their ____.  | *careers | holidays | meals
The writer's attitude is [*cautiously optimistic|completely negative|uninterested].
The passage focuses on [*work and skills|museum design|airport security].
The text suggests technology alone is [*not the only issue|the only solution|irrelevant].
